Omo, who sent you? Even your village people are denying involvement at this point. They said, 'we no know this one o.'
The confidence you carry should be studied by scientists. You saw yourself in the mirror this morning and still said, 'yeah, today na my day.'
Your destiny helper saw your file, sighed deeply, and transferred it to another department.
You look like the kind of person that sends 'you up?' messages to people that changed numbers two years ago.
Your CV is less of a career document and more of a mystery novel. Too many missing chapters.
Even autocorrect has stopped fighting your mistakes. It just accepts them as part of your personality now.
You carry yourself like a TED Talk but your decisions dey move like WhatsApp forwards from unverified sources.
Your ancestors held a family meeting about you and the final resolution was simply 'we tried.'
You have the confidence of a billionaire and the planning skills of someone who studies for exams in the exam hall.
Your village has upgraded your status from 'promising child' to 'ongoing situation.'
Even Google Maps looked at your life direction and returned: 'recalculating...' for three years straight.
You package yourself like premium subscription but your performance dey give free trial version.
Your guardian angel has started forwarding your prayers to customer support.
You look like the type to miss a deadline and somehow blame network issues, weather conditions, and the economy together.
Your future is typing... but the message never arrives.
If potential was money, you'd still somehow be owing people.
You radiate the kind of energy that makes group projects suddenly become individual assignments.
Your life strategy seems to be 'we'll cross that bridge when we get there,' meanwhile you've passed twelve bridges already.
Even your shadow sometimes needs personal space.
You give motivational speaker energy but your own life is still in beta testing.
You are proof that confidence and competence are two completely different subscriptions.
Your problems have problems because of you.
You don't chase dreams; you send them a friend request and hope for the best.
The amount of faith you have in yourself deserves applause because evidence certainly isn't helping.
You move through life like a software update nobody asked for but somehow everyone has to deal with.
You woke up, looked in the mirror, and still decided to show up. That level of confidence is impressive. The results? Not so much.
Your village people finally got promoted. Now they’re sending you to the internet to embarrass yourself daily.
Even your destiny helper looked at you, asked for a refund, and moved to another city.
You have the energy of someone who gets blocked on six apps and still sends 'wyd' at 3am.
Your CV has more gaps than your excuses. The future already auto-rejected your application.
Your phone autocorrects your name to 'mistake'. Even technology is trying to warn you.
You argue like someone who’d lose a debate to a lizard and still feel like a genius.
Your ancestors are in a group chat right now. The topic is you, and nobody is defending you.
You carry yourself like a premium product but sell at clearance price. The market notices.
Your guardian angel just submitted a resignation letter. Even angels have limits.
Google Maps can’t find your destiny. It just keeps saying 'route unavailable.'
Your future called. It said it needs more time — been saying that since 2019.
You miss opportunities like it’s a full-time job. Then blame everyone except yourself.
You’re the reason your village keeps holding emergency meetings. Take a break from being the main character.
You show up with main character energy but zero plot development.
Your excuses are more consistent than your effort. That’s actually impressive.
Even your backup plan has a backup plan for avoiding you.
You’re moving like someone who peaked in secondary school and thinks that’s enough.
Your life is stuck on loading screen while everyone else is buffering ahead.
You talk big but deliver small. The gap between your mouth and your results is concerning.
At this point, your potential is just disappointed in you.
You’re the type to lose a fight with common sense and still claim victory.
Your vibe is 'almost there' but you’ve been saying that for years.
Even your mirror is starting to ask for personal space.
You’re collecting Ls like they’re limited edition. Time to switch strategies.
Your standards are high but your consistency is in the basement.
You’re out here playing checkers while life is playing chess. Catch up.
Your confidence is loud but your results are suspiciously quiet.
You treat self-improvement like an optional side quest. That’s why you’re stuck.
The universe gave you signs. You turned them into excuses.
You’re one bad decision away from becoming a cautionary tale.
Your circle is small because even your friends need a break sometimes.
You have main character syndrome with NPC results.
Life keeps giving you chances and you keep ghosting them.
You’re the reason 'potential' is a dangerous word.
Your effort is seasonal but your complaints are year-round.
You move like your problems are permanent and your solutions are temporary.
Even your reflection is starting to side-eye you.
You’re built for greatness but operating on minimal effort.
At this rate, your comeback story is going to need a miracle and serious work.
